audit_items.proof_trace: The function is linearly proportional in amountIn: all other factors (assetInUsdPrice, priceMultiplier, assetOutUsdPrice, decimals) are fixed per call. Solady's mulDivUp uses 512-bit intermediate arithmetic preventing overflow, and rounds UP at every step (super-proportional). With 3 chained mulDivUp, accumulated rounding is at most -3 absolute wei, but in practice (1e18-scale amounts, 1e8-scale prices) the error is ≤1 wei — well within the property's -2 tolerance.
